title: 🦞 OpenClaw: Your Step-by-Step Guide to Seamless Telegram Integration - Oreate AI
content:
OpenClaw 技术干货

# Unlocking OpenClaw: Your Step-by-Step Guide to Seamless Telegram Integration. OpenClaw orchestrates everything, but the real 'thinking' and 'doing' comes from the AI models it connects to. If you've got a Mac mini, it's fantastic for keeping OpenClaw running 24/7 as a dedicated AI host. Next, you'll need an AI model. ### Getting OpenClaw Installed: The Technical Bits. Before we install OpenClaw itself, we need to set up its environment. The recommended path is Homebrew -> fnm -> Node.js -> OpenClaw. **Install Node.js**: OpenClaw officially recommends Node.js version 22. **Install OpenClaw**: The final installation step is simple: `npm i -g openclaw`. To connect OpenClaw with Telegram, you need a special token. **Verify the Connection**: Open Telegram, find your newly created bot, and send it a message like `/start` or 'Hello'. Go back to your Terminal and run: `openclaw pairing approve telegram PAIR-ABC123` (replace `PAIR-ABC123` with your actual code). You've successfully connected OpenClaw to Telegram. `openclaw pairing approve telegram PAIR-ABC123`. Open your Terminal and run `openclaw configure`.

title: 🦞 From Chat App to AI Powerhouse: Telegram + OpenClaw - Medium
content:
OpenClaw 技术干货

In this guide, we’ll walk through how to install OpenClaw on macOS and connect it to Telegram step by step. OpenClaw is a self-hosted AI assistant that runs locally on your machine while connecting to messaging platforms like Telegram, WhatsApp, Discord, and more. Before connecting OpenClaw to Telegram, we first need to install it locally. After entering your API key, OpenClaw verifies it and automatically configures a default model. ## Step 5: Connect OpenClaw to Telegram. After configuring your model, OpenClaw will ask you to select a chat channel. After selecting **Telegram (Bot API)** as your channel, OpenClaw will prompt you to enter your Telegram bot token. After entering your Telegram bot token, OpenClaw finalizes the channel configuration. After completing the configuration, OpenClaw installs and starts the **Gateway service**. Messages sent to your Telegram bot are routed through the OpenClaw Gateway, processed by your selected model, and returned in real time.

# ​ Cron jobs (Gateway scheduler). openclaw cron run <job-id>. openclaw cron runs --id <job-id>`. ## ​ Tool-call equivalents (Gateway cron tool). ## ​ Where cron jobs are stored. ## ​ Beginner-friendly overview. ## ​ Concepts. ### ​ Jobs. ### ​ Schedules. #### ​ Main session jobs (system events). #### ​ Isolated jobs (dedicated cron sessions). ### ​ Payload shapes (what runs). #### ​ Webhook delivery flow. ### ​ cron.add params. ### ​ cron.update params. ### ​ cron.run and cron.remove params. ## ​ Retry policy. ### ​ Transient errors (retried). ### ​ Permanent errors (no retry). ## ​ Configuration. store: "~/.openclaw/cron/jobs.json",. ## ​ Maintenance. ### ​ Defaults. ### ​ How it works. ### ​ Customize examples. openclaw cron add --name "Ops sweep" --cron "0 6 * * *" --session isolated --message "Check ops queue" --agent ops. openclaw cron run <jobId> --due`. `openclaw cron runs --id <jobId> --limit 50`. ## ​ Troubleshooting. ### ​ A recurring job keeps delaying after failures.

When you are ready to run it 24/7 in a clean, isolated environment, start here again: Tencent Cloud Lighthouse Special Offer. * Confirm the agent is running as a background service (not tied to your SSH session).

title: 🦞 OpenClaw cron scheduler guide for proactive automations
content:
OpenClaw 技术干货

Cron is for tasks that need a precise schedule or tasks you want to keep out of your main conversation history. Heartbeat handles the recurring background checks and cron handles “at a specific time” and “run this job in isolation.”. OpenClaw keeps cron job definitions on disk and it keeps per-run history separately. OpenClaw cron supports three scheduling patterns and you pick based on the job you’re building. A main session cron job drops a system event into your main session then the agent processes it with full context. A cron job can run and do nothing visible or it can deliver output to a channel. ## Creating cron jobs via chat. The agent can convert that into a cron schedule plus an isolated message payload plus delivery targeting. Create an isolated cron job with a cron expression like `0 7 * * *` and set announce delivery to your preferred channel and target. ### Why did my cron job not run?

title: 🦞 OpenClaw Cron Advanced 2026: Every Schedule Command Q&A
content:
OpenClaw 技术干货

**About This Guide:** OpenClaw's cron system is the Gateway's built-in scheduler — it persists jobs, wakes agents at the right time, and can deliver output back to your chat. ## `openclaw cron add`: Creating Jobs. ## `openclaw cron edit`: Updating Jobs. `openclaw cron run`  triggers a job immediately. `openclaw cron list` shows all jobs in your store with their IDs, schedules, enabled status, and last/next run times. ### Q How do I view a cron job's run history? `openclaw cron runs` shows the execution history for a specific job. `openclaw system event` sends an immediate system event to the main agent session without creating a persistent cron job. * → Run `openclaw cron list` to verify job is enabled. * → Use `openclaw cron run`  to manually trigger and reset. openclaw cron add --name "..." --every 30m --session isolated --message "..." --announce. ### Keep Your Cron Jobs Running 24/7 with VPN07. OpenClaw cron jobs run around the clock — your VPN should too.
